turbines.name: Calm baseline
turbines.blurb: No injected fault. The reference turbine.

turbines.name: Thermal drift
turbines.blurb: A slow fever begins in spring and never lifts.

turbines.name: Pitch fault
turbines.blurb: One blade jumps out of alignment, abruptly.

turbines.name: Yaw drift
turbines.blurb: Late-year misalignment; it stops facing the wind.

turbines.name: Thermal drift, recovered
turbines.blurb: Heats up, then slowly cools back to health.

turbines.name: Pitch fault, repaired
turbines.blurb: Pitch fault, then a clean repair in midsummer.

turbines.name: Thermal drift, repaired
turbines.blurb: Fever rises, then is fixed in a single step.

turbines.name: Yaw drift, repaired
turbines.blurb: Misaligns, then snaps back after a service visit.

turbines.name: Thermal and yaw
turbines.blurb: Two faults stack and neither is ever repaired.
